title: AI Decision Trace — Order Support & Returns Assistant
description: Template dashboard (import via Datadog UI/API). Promotes consequential agent decisions to first-class, inspectable records: evidence, options, selection basis, policy result, authority and business outcome. Implements the decision-tracing capability in docs/decision-contract.md. Rationale and confidence are agent-emitted in production, never back-filled by the observability layer. Adapt metric/facet names to your actual instrumentation — see ../README.md.

definition.content: **Decision tracing** answers *why the agent selected this action from the alternatives available to it* — distinct from execution tracing (what ran) on the other dashboards. Each decision span (`genai.decision.*`) is correlated to its workflow trace, retrieval/policy/tool spans and business outcome by `workflow_id`. Rationale (`selection_basis`) is a structured, externally-inspectable summary — NOT model chain-of-thought (see docs/decision-contract.md §5).

definition.title: Decisions traced vs. guardrail overrides — daily

definition.content: **Investigator workflow:** filter to a `decision_type` (e.g. `refund_eligibility`), open a decision span, and read its `options_evaluated`, `selected_action`, `selection_basis`, `policy_evaluations`, `authority` and `business_outcome` attributes in one view — the first-class decision record. In the static demo this is the **Decision Trace** tab (`dashboard/`). Not yet modelled: cross-version decision replay/comparison (decision-contract.md P2).
